---
title: "Clocks on the Web"
subtitle: "Preliminary Data Results"
date: "2026-03-26"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
---

## Approach

- Probe HTTP servers by sending HEAD requests timed to land near second boundaries
- Vary the send offset across the RTT window to sample different clock readings
- Compare local clock (send/receive timestamps) against server `Date:` header

## Results

## Next Steps
